ddls:
CREATE TABLE "obesity_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year the data was collected */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gender category */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data collection method */,
  "obesity_percentage" REAL /* Obesity percentage for the given year, region, and gender */,
  "obesity_confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the obesity percentage */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) for the given year, region, and gender */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obesity_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obesity_data_data_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_collection_method_id") REFERENCES data_collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obesity_data_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obesity_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_obesity_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Starting date of the year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Ending date of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender category */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES obesity_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES obesity_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data point */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data point was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES obesity_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the quality check was performed on */,
  "check_name" TEXT /* Name of the quality check */,
  "check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the quality check was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES obesity_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point referenced in the publication */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the publication was released */,
  "publication_link" TEXT /* Link to the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_publications_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES obesity_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being version controlled */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES obesity_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being cited */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication citing the data */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_citations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES obesity_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_citations_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES data_publications ("publication_id")
)
